> take spectacles
# You put on the spectacles.
> wear spectacles

## Stairwell

> down

> take wrench

## Laboratory

> s

# You swing the wrench. The glass shatters cleanly. The brass key drops into
#   your hand.
> break glass case

## Cold Storage

> e

# Unlock the cabinet
# The key turns smoothly. The lock disengages with a click that echoes longer
#   than it should.
> unlock cabinet with key
# Pick up the fungus
> take fungus
# It tastes of nothing. Then of everything. The walls ripple once and settle
#   into new shapes. You understand, now, that this is not distortion. This is
#   clarity.
> eat fungus
# Laboratory
> w
# Where the floor was solid before, a wound has opened -- a vertical shaft
#   lined in something wet and muscular. You descend. Cistern The chamber is
#   alive.
> s
# You grip the handle and turn it left. Metal screams against metal. Below,
#   the dark water begins to move -- circling, spiraling, draining.
> turn valve left
# You lower yourself through the grate. Source Y0u desc3nd thr0ugh th3 gr4te
#   1nto a sp@ce th4t sh0uld n0t ex1st.
> down
> touch basin
